use_cases: When you need Penetration Testing, use binwalk because This is an updated version of the Binwalk firmware analysis tool, re-written in Rust for speed and accuracy.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `binwalk DIR-890L_AxFW110b07.bin` as documented upstream for binwalk.
When chaining Penetration Testing tools, pair binwalk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `binwalk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
